sprintCommits.message: test(coverage): gateway-tools.ts small-tools cluster sweep — 66.52% → 69.16% lines

sprintCommits.note: Wave 1 complete — gateway-tools.ts 58.62% → 80.03% (+21.41pp, +941 lines, 184 new tests across 4 sessions)

New test file ai-proxy-extra-paths.test.ts covers shogo_sk_ bearer auth path (un-skipped) + logCacheControlIfEnabled gated diagnostic (AI_PROXY_LOG_CACHE=1) for both stream and nonstream Anthropic chat completions. No new test failures introduced; 4 pre-existing E2E failures unchanged.

Second extra-paths test file. Flips hasBalance/hasAdvancedModelAccess to false to cover all 402/403 billing rejection tails in /ai/v1/chat/completions and /ai/anthropic/v1/messages. Covers AbortError → 499 and non-Abort error → 500 in Anthropic pass-through. Covers resolveModel claude/gpt prefix fallbacks and null return. Covers resolveAgentModel local branches with LOCAL_LLM_BASE_URL set. Crosses the ≥95% line-coverage threshold. No new test failures; 4 pre-existing E2E failures unchanged.

New test file voice-routes-twilio-provision.test.ts covers GET /voice/twilio/available-numbers/:projectId and POST /voice/twilio/provision-number/:projectId — both endpoints that voice-routes.test.ts and voice-routes-runtime-token.test.ts skipped. Tests happy path, idempotency, all 5 error tails: 503 (unconfigured), 402 (balance), 502 (EL agent fail/Twilio search fail/Twilio purchase fail/EL link fail with compensating release), 409 (no numbers available). Funcs now 100%. No new test failures.

New test file voice-routes-twilio-cleanup.test.ts covers: DELETE /voice/twilio/number/:projectId (5 tests: no_number, happy path, Twilio release error, EL deletePhone error, Twilio unconfigured warning); POST /voice/twilio/status/:projectId metering catch (3 tests: recordCallUsage failure, no-CallSid ignore, project_not_configured ignore); POST /voice/translator/chat/:chatSessionId (6 tests: 503 no model, 400 invalid JSON, 404 session not found, 403 non-member, 200 happy path, resolveVoiceContext error warning); POST /voice/transcript/:chatSessionId persist 500. Funcs remain at 100%. No new test failures.

sprintCommits.message: test(coverage): voice.ts readonly + agents/sync paths — 92.01% → 92.48% lines
sprintCommits.note: New test file voice-routes-readonly-and-errors.test.ts covers readonly endpoints (GET /voice/usage with date filters, GET /voice/calls with limit clamping + transcript variants, GET /voice/calls/:callId with 404), POST /projects/:projectId/agents/sync (invalid JSON + array body + happy path), POST /voice/twilio/outbound auth/body validation, and /voice/signed-url EL throw tail. Smaller delta than prior sessions (+7 lines) because most readonly bodies were already covered; the new tests primarily add defensive matrix coverage. Funcs remain at 100%. No new test failures (5 OTHER_TOKEN cross-project tests dropped after they were found to fail under cross-file mock pollution; that branch is already covered by voice-routes-runtime-token.test.ts for signed-url).

sprintCommits.message: docs(coverage): bump README backend → 82.12% (expanded v3 aggregate, full re-measure)
sprintCommits.note: Full re-measure across all 11 backend packages. Previous baseline (66713/75174 = 88.74% from 2026-05-27) drifted vs current code: instrumented denominator grew from 75174 → 89571 (+14397 lines), primarily from apps/api (+5996 LF) and agent-runtime (+7663 LF) which now exercise more transitively-imported modules through the new test files added in Wave 1 + Wave 2 sessions. The 82.12% is the honest current number; the prior 88.74% was correct for its smaller denominator but stale against the now-larger instrumented surface. packages/model-catalog is excluded because its test cannot resolve @shogo-ai/sdk/model-catalog — pre-existing infra bug, tracked separately.
